title: Fig. 1 in Expressed sequence tags in venomous tissue of Scorpaena plumieri (Scorpaeniformes: Scorpaenidae)
author: Costa, Fábio L. S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Agarose- formaldehyde electrophoresis of RNA from Scorpaena plumieri. A) 1) 2 µg of E. coli tRNA; 2) 2 µg de rRNA de Rattus norvegicus; 3) and 4) 2 µg total RNA from S. plumieri spine gland. B) 1) 2 µg de total RNA from S. plumieri; 2) the same sample incubated 2 h a 37ºC before electrophoresis.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Agarose- formaldehyde electrophoresis of RNA from Scorpaena plumieri. A) 1) 2 µg of E. coli tRNA; 2) 2 µg de rRNA de Rattus norvegicus; 3) and 4) 2 µg total RNA from S. plumieri spine gland. B) 1) 2 µg de total RNA from S. plumieri; 2) the same sample incubated 2 h a 37ºC before electrophoresis.
